bookNavigator.text: Synthesize it as soon as possible.
Are you going to invite Monika?
Travel outside town.
Gather materials.
Return to the atelier.
Perform Synthesis.
Head to the <CLGR>Forgotten Nursery<CLNR>.
Make <CLGR>Gathering Gloves<CLNR> for those two.
My... Memories...
...Don't put me in the cauldron again.
You need <CLGR>a body<CLNR>, <CLGR>clothes<CLNR>, <CLGR>a power source<CLNR>, and <CLGR>a tool to move souls<CLNR>.
It's almost time, Sophie. Do your best.
Come with me to the <CLGR>Scar of the Land<CLNR>.
Please make <CLGR>Hexe Auris<CLNR>.
The <CLGR>Key of Truth<CLNR>... I know you can make it.
I have a bad feeling. Let's hurry to the <CLGR>Gates of Wisdom<CLNR>.
We need to hurry further into the <CLGR>Gates of Wisdom<CLNR>...!
...Let's return to the atelier.
...Oh, we're going to Marguerite's shop, correct?
These changes... Could this be...
The start of our dream... Please try making it.
Let's go to the <CLGR>Library of All Creation<CLNR>.
Need to go further into the <CLNR>Library of All Creation<CLNR>. Luard is there.
Sophie. Let's return to our atelier.
An <CLGR>Uni Bag<CLNR> might be good.
I recommend an <CLGR>Uni Bag<CLNR>.
How about an <CLGR>Uni Bag<CLNR>?
What do you think about a <CLGR>Bomb<CLNR>?
A <CLGR>Bomb<CLNR> might be good.
How about a <CLGR>Bomb<CLNR>?
Do you know how to make an <CLGR>Ice Bomb<CLNR>?
An <CLGR>Ice Bomb<CLNR> might be suitable.
An <CLGR>Ice Bomb<CLNR> might be good.

You should be able to make an <CLGR>Uni Bag<CLNR>.
You'll improve if you make an <CLGR>Uni Bag<CLNR>.
Shouldn't you be able to make a <CLGR>Bomb<CLNR>?

Try making an <CLGR>Ice Bomb<CLNR>.

Maybe try making <CLGR>Prototype Fertilizer<CLNR>?
Shouldn't you be able to make <CLGR>Prototype Fertilizer<CLNR>?
The path of the alchemist cannot be walked in a day.
Sophie, your stomach is growling.
It's not good to work too hard, either.
Maybe you should take a little break?
Now then, what should I teach you next?
I'm a little tired...
...I'll get mad if you start writing nonsense.
Slow and steady is the best pace to learn.
You're always quite lively, Sophie.
The key to improving alchemy is curiosity.
It seems your alchemy is improving.
*Yawn*... Oh, I'm sorry.
What could I teach to help you grow more...
Now, what should we do?
You're looking much more like an alchemist now.
If you start drawing... Oh wait, I'm not a book now.
This body... I'm still not totally used to it...
Hehe. These clothes... Aren't too bad.
Even this body gets hungry... How strange.
I'll teach you everything I can.
...Huh? Oh, yes. What is it?
Where could he...
Not remembering is quite irritating...
I'm sorry, I'm not feeling too well...
What could I do now...
I can't just leave him be...
This is... My fault...
Don't worry about it, just continue your studies.
Where should I start...
You've become quite the splendid alchemist.
There's still more for you to learn.
Sophie. What would you like to know?
Hehe, what should we do?
Would you like to have a little tea break?
Would you like to go shopping sometime?
I'm quite accustomed to this body now.
People seem to stare when I go outside...
Sophie, I'm hungry.
You sure do work hard.
The path of the alchemist cannot be walked in a day.
Sophie, your stomach is growling.
It's not good to work too hard, either.
Maybe you should take a little break?
Now then, what should I teach you next?
I'm a little tired...
...I'll get mad if you start writing nonsense.
Slow and steady is the best pace to learn.
You're always quite lively, Sophie.
The key to improving alchemy is curiosity.
It seems your alchemy is improving.
*Yawn*... Oh, I'm sorry.
What could I teach to help you grow more...
Now, what should we do?
You're looking much more like an alchemist now.
If you start drawing... Oh wait, I'm not a book now.
This body... I'm still not totally used to it...
Hehe. These clothes... Aren't too bad.
Even this body gets hungry... How strange.
I'll teach you everything I can.
...Huh? Oh, yes. What is it?
Where could he...
Not remembering is quite irritating...
I'm sorry, I'm not feeling too well...
What could I do now...
I can't just leave him be...
This is... My fault...
Don't worry about it, just continue your studies.
Where should I start...
You've become quite the splendid alchemist.
There's still more for you to learn.
Sophie. What would you like to know?
Hehe, what should we do?
Would you like to have a little tea break?
Would you like to go shopping sometime?
I'm quite accustomed to this body now.
People seem to stare when I go outside...
Sophie, I'm hungry.
You sure do work hard.
First, learn how to make a <CLGR>Bomb<CLNR>.
Study the techniques for making an <CLGR>Ingot<CLNR>.
A cold bomb... Maybe think about how to make an <CLGR>Ice Bomb<CLNR>?
Think about how to make a <CLGR>Friendly Persona<CLNR>.
Think about how to produce <CLGR>Stahl Metal<CLNR>.
You should be able to figure out how to produce <CLGR>Silvalia<CLNR>.
Think about the recipe to make a <CLGR>Codex of Creation<CLNR>.
Work out how to produce <CLGR>Rubilium<CLNR>.
Think about the recipe for an <CLGR>Angel's Whisper<CLNR>.
You'll improve if you understand how to make a <CLGR>Flame of Origin<CLNR>.
Try making all kinds of items for now.
You must prepare carefully when fighting monsters.
Sophie, do you have medicine and bombs?
It might be best if you strengthened your body a little more...
Take it slow and steady. There's no need to rush.
Monsters at night are powerful. Be sure you're thoroughly prepared.
You should try to fill your Basket completely.
It may be a good idea to buy items from shops at times.
A good bomb can rival the blows of even the mightiest warriors.
Maybe you should have Monika and Oskar carry items too?
There are many things that fall under the category of water.
Synthesis is the shortest path to improvement.
Try going to all kinds of places.
Do you have enough money? Be sure not to waste it.
Cloths and metals have many different uses.
If you can't beat monsters, try upgrading items and equipment.
You need to be well prepared to defeat powerful enemies.
It's also important to check your enemy's attributes.
When fatigued, you cannot demonstrate your full strength.
Perhaps it's about time to look back at old recipes?
Changing materials can let you make items that act differently.
Now, try Synthesizing something.
Items are an alchemist's lifeline.
Don't hoard your items, use them liberally.
To attack or defend? Such balance is a big factor in battle.
High quality weapons can save your life.
Weapons and armor can be crafted from many types of materials.
There are things to gain from fighting monsters, too.
Be sure to pay attention to your items' traits.
Do you have enough items to take with you outside?
All alchemists should be particular about their cauldrons.
Bombs come both first and second.
Do you have enough medicine prepared?
If you don't have enough money, maybe you can sell unneeded items?
Monsters sometimes drop treasure chests when they are defeated.
This should be obvious, but everyone has things they like. Think deeply.
If you give someone a gift, they might give you something in return.
It's important to become friends with many different people.
Now, Synthesize plenty of items.
Are there any places you haven't traveled to yet?
It may be time to make even stronger bombs.
It's very important what traits you apply to your equipment.
Have you equipped any accessories?
You may learn about rare materials through hearsay.
Can't beat an enemy? Try reviewing your equipment.
Monster slaying is all about taking initiative.
There is much to gain from fighting powerful foes.
Are you coordinating properly with your allies?
Some materials can only be obtained from monsters.
...It seems there isn't much left that I can teach you.
